title: IndiGo is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IndiGo is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
IndiGo is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IndiGo:
IndiGo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo!
